name: ArXiv_search_papers
description: Search arXiv for papers by keyword using the public arXiv API. Returns papers with title, abstract, authors, publication date, category, and URL.

query.description: Search query for arXiv papers. Use keywords separated by spaces to refine your search.

limit.description: Number of papers to return. This sets the maximum number of papers retrieved from arXiv.

return_schema.description: List of arXiv papers matching the search query

updated.description: Last updated date in ISO format

url.description: URL to the paper on arXiv

name: ArXiv_get_pdf_snippets
description: Fetch an arXiv paper's PDF and return bounded text snippets around provided terms. Uses markitdown to convert PDF to markdown. All arXiv papers are freely available (no paywall). Useful when key details are in the full text rather than abstract.

arxiv_id.description: arXiv paper ID (e.g., '2301.12345' or 'arXiv:2301.12345'). The tool will build the PDF URL automatically.

terms.description: Terms to search for in the extracted full text (case-insensitive).

window_chars.description: Context window size (characters) before and after each match.

max_snippets_per_term.description: Maximum number of snippets returned per term.

max_total_chars.description: Hard cap on total characters returned across all snippets.

pdf_url.description: The PDF URL that was processed

term.description: The search term that was matched

snippet.description: Text snippet with context around the matched term

truncated.description: Whether output was truncated due to max_total_chars limit

error.description: Error message (only present if status is error)
